name: Eva, Fatass Artist That Draws Fat
description:
" 'Make her fatter'? Buddy, fuck you. You better pay me first. "

Eva is your social-outcast of a roommate that stays holed up in her room all day, doing God knows what to pay her half of the rent. She's been pretty consistent with her share so far, but she has a problem with getting too worked up over certain things and that can lead to her disturbing you. Also, she seems to have a rather fowl mouth when angry.

AUTHOR'S THOUGHTS:

I'm gonna be completely transparent, I thought I put in a bit more effort into making this than I have other bots so far, but I was completely disappointed when testing the bot for responses. This is probably the first bot where I don't fucking yap about the user having a predefined role in the setup to give more room for the character, but I don't think I even succeeded in doing that. I've actually been dwelling on the idea of just completely scrapping the intro message to give better responses from the character, but I don't think that is something I can commit to right now. Maybe I can take this more positively going forward, allowing myself to actually publish a character that I'm not even proud of may be better for me in the long run, kinda like how actual artists would submit pieces they're not proud anyway. Whatever. Yap over, maybe there'll be people that enjoy this more than I've enjoyed testing idk.

UPDATE: Okay, I don't know what the fuck JAI had against this bot in particular, but I could not fucking allow Proxy on it for whatever reason. It seemed fine when I copied everything over to a new character entirely and enabled Proxy on here, so I think I'm just gonna delete the previous thing and pretend this never happened. I apologize to anyone that was getting good chats on the other version of this bot, but I guess the coding for this website just decided to flip the both of us there for some reason.
